title: EVgo Stock Charges Ahead On Revenue Beat, Optimistic Outlook: Retail Sentiment Soars
text: Following EVgo's earnings release in November 2024, retail sentiment on StockTwits flipped into extremely bullish territory with a noticeable surge in message volume. The strong Q3 2024 results showing record revenue and network expansion generated significant excitement among retail investors. EVgo's stock surged following the earnings announcement as the company demonstrated continued business momentum with record throughput and expanding customer base. The optimistic outlook for 2025 with guidance of $340-380 million in revenue and targets for EBITDA breakeven further boosted investor confidence. Retail investors showed enthusiasm for the company's aggressive network expansion plans and strong operational metrics. The combination of earnings beat, record operational metrics, and positive forward guidance generated a bullish sentiment shift among retail investors on social platforms.
